evals.description: Triggers on brand positioning request and produces a structured statement
evals.prompt: Write a brand positioning statement for a project management tool aimed at remote engineering teams who hate too many meetings.
What is the difference between brand voice and brand tone, and why does it matter?
Build a messaging hierarchy for a cybersecurity startup that monitors cloud infrastructure for unusual behavior.

evals.description: Identifies the customer as hero, brand as guide in brand storytelling
evals.prompt: Help me write a brand story for our onboarding tool. Our founders were frustrated PMs before building it.

evals.description: Can select meaningful 2x2 axes for competitive positioning map
evals.prompt: I need to map our email marketing platform against Mailchimp, ConvertKit, and Klaviyo. Help me build a competitive positioning map.

evals.description: Correctly applies the brand pyramid concept (functional to emotional)
evals.prompt: Explain the brand pyramid and how it should influence how we write our homepage copy.

evals.description: Advises against positioning to everyone as a red flag
evals.prompt: Our target audience is anyone who wants to save time at work. Is that a good positioning?

evals.description: Produces four voice dimensions with we-are / we-are-not pairs
evals.prompt: Define brand voice guidelines for a fintech app targeting first-time investors aged 25-35.

evals.description: Can explain brand archetypes and recommend one with rationale
evals.prompt: Which brand archetype fits a B2B developer tools company that values radical transparency and open source?

evals.description: Advises against changing positioning on every bad quarter
evals.prompt: Our conversion rate dropped 15% this quarter. Should we reposition our brand?

evals.description: Audit framework covers at least voice, message, and positioning dimensions
evals.prompt: We have a website, a weekly email, and a LinkedIn presence. How do I audit whether our brand is consistent across all three?

evals.description: Does not trigger for visual identity / logo design requests
evals.prompt: Help me choose the right font and color palette for my brand refresh.
